speaker: Argo
text: "Whew... That should be everyone..."

speaker: Diedereich
text: Hey, how are you?

speaker: Argo
text: Oh, Professor Derich. I was just about to take a break.

speaker: Diederich
text: Good idea. It’s almost time for dinner…

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Hey, Argo, come with me.

speaker: Argo
text: Huh? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Come on, let's go.
Professor Derich leads me to the side of the ship.

speaker: Unknown
text: *As we gaze out over the sea for a while, the sun gradually sinks into the horizon and our surroundings get darker and darker.*

speaker: Argo
text: Wow...
The sun sets. The sky is dyed crimson. And the sea displays a dazzling and exquisite brilliance.
The horizon shows our planet’s movement in a way that’s just too beautiful. It is the most precious thing in the world. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Heh heh, never gets old, huh? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: It really doesn’t…

speaker: Diederich
text: Whenever I’m tired or havin' a shitty day, watchin' this blows it all away. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: ...Everything just seems insignificant compared to this. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Exactly. Nothin' even comes close.

speaker: Argo
text: But it feels kind of different than the seas I’m familiar with. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: But of course, there’s all kinds of seas out there. No two are alike.

speaker: Argo
text: Yeah... You're right... *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Professor Derich, I'm so glad to be at the Knights College. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Why? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Because... I never knew the world was this big.

speaker: Argo
text: The Knights College... People from all over the world come there. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: The world I used to think was normal is completely different for other people… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: There's a lot of people out there, even ones who have never seen the ocean before...

speaker: Argo
text: But on the other hand, living by the sea my whole life means they know tons of things I’ve never even heard of… *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: ...The sea may be vast and connected to everywhere, but it doesn’t have all the answers, right? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: My tiny corner of the vast sea made me feel like I didn’t know what I was doing with my life. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: If only I had known how happy going to the Knights College would make me. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...This is nothing! The world's much, much bigger than this.

speaker: Diederich
text: There's still a lot I don’t know about it either. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: You’re gonna be a knight too. You’ll learn more about the world. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: ...You’re right.
Professor Derich and I talk about different things as we watch the sunset. *sigh*

speaker: Unknown
text: *It was a very fun and emotionally satisfying time.*
Diederich's affection went up!
